§6Foundry Mold§f

§aShape molten metal into specific forms and castings.§f

The §bFoundry Mold§f is placed into a §bFoundry Basin§f to determine the shape of the casting. Different molds produce different results such as ingots, plates, blocks, and specialized components.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at the Steel Anvil.

§6Usage§f:
§b• Place§f the mold into the foundry basin GUI
§b• Pour§f molten metal from the crucible
§b• Wait§f for the casting to cool
§b• Extract§f the finished product

§6Available Molds§f:
§b• Ingot Mold§f: Produces ingots
§b• Plate Mold§f: Produces plates
§b• Block Mold§f: Produces storage blocks
§b• Specialized molds§f: For specific components

§eTip§f: Different molds are available for different shapes. Check JEI for the specific mold recipes. The foundry molds are reusable.
